content_sections.heading: AMC Sahayak Senior Clerk Recruitment 2026 - Notification Out
content_sections.text: The Ahmedabad Municipal Corporation (AMC), Mahanagar Seva Sadan, has officially published Jaherkhbar Kramank 02/2026-27 for recruitment to the Administrative Cadre. This is a direct recruitment drive open to eligible candidates from across Gujarat. Online applications are the only accepted mode - no offline or postal applications will be entertained.

rows.document: Official Notification – AMC Sahayak Senior Clerk 2026 (Advt. No. 02/2026-27)

content_sections.heading: AMC Sahayak Senior Clerk Recruitment 2026 - Overview
content_sections.text: Daily Current Affairs 23 June 2026: Download Free PDF Now

content_sections.heading: AMC Sahayak Senior Clerk Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
content_sections.text: Candidates applying for AMC Sahayak Senior Clerk 2026 must note the key dates below. Applications submitted after 07 July 2026 will not be accepted. The fee payment window closes on 09 July 2026, giving candidates a two-day window after the application deadline to complete fee payment.

rows.event: Last Date for Online Fee Payment

content_sections.heading: Vacancy Breakdown – AMC Sahayak Senior Clerk 2026
content_sections.text: The 250 vacancies for AMC Assistant Senior Clerk are distributed across five categories - General, SC, ST, SEBC (Socially and Educationally Backward Classes), and EWS. Within each category, 33% of posts are reserved for women candidates. Additionally, 10 posts are reserved for Persons with Disabilities (Divyangjan). PwD reservation is available only to candidates with a disability of 40% or more, certified by a Civil Surgeon.

rows.disability_type: Locomotor disability (including CP, Leprosy Cured, Dwarfism, Acid Attack Victims, Spinal Deformity/Injury)
rows.codes: OA, OL, BA, BL, OAL, CP, LC, Dw, AAV, SD, SI

rows.disability_type: Autism, Intellectual Disability, Specific Learning Disability, Mental Illness, Multiple Disabilities

content_sections.heading: AMC Sahayak Senior Clerk Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Before applying for AMC Assistant Senior Clerk Recruitment 2026, candidates must verify they meet both the educational qualification and the relevant work experience requirement. Both conditions must be satisfied simultaneously. Candidates must hold a Bachelor's degree in any discipline with a minimum of 50% marks from any University established under Central or State Act in India, or from an Institution recognised or declared as Deemed University under Section 3 of the UGC Act, 1956. Candidates must have at least 3 years of combined or separate administrative cadre experience in any of the following types of organisations: Government / Local Self-Government institutions / Government undertakings / Semi-government bodies / Boards / Corporations / Municipal Corporations Companies registered under Companies Act 1956 or 2013 Co-operative societies registered under Co-operative Societies Act 2012 The experience must have been in a regular pay scale - either through direct recruitment or under the Gujarat Government Finance Department's fixed pay scheme (Resolution dated 16/02/2006, Ref. Kharach/2002/57/Z-1) on fixed or ex-gratia fixed salary basis. Experience that will NOT be counted: Part-time, daily wage, apprenticeship, trainee, articleship, honorary/invited faculty, in-charge additional duties, or experience gained during study period (e.g., Ph.D., research fellowships, internships) will not be treated as valid experience. Only an offer letter or appointment letter alone is also not accepted as proof - supporting documents such as increment orders, pay-related records, or other substantive evidence must be provided alongside. Candidates must hold a certificate of Basic Computer Knowledge as per the syllabus fixed by the Gujarat State General Administration Department (Resolution dated 13/08/2008 and 18/03/2016, Ref. CRR/10/2007/120320/G5) from any recognised training institution, OR hold a Diploma/Degree/Certificate in computer knowledge from a government-recognised university/institution, OR have studied Computer as a subject in Standard 10 or Standard 12. Candidates who do not hold such a certificate at the time of application may still apply, but must obtain and produce the CCC (for Class 3 posts) or CCC+ (for Class 1 and 2) certificate before joining. If they join without it, they must clear the examination within one year of joining.

content_sections.heading: AMC Sahayak Senior Clerk Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: The age limit for AMC Assistant Senior Clerk 2026 is calculated as on the last date of online application submission (07 July 2026). Candidates must be at least 18 years of age and must not exceed 38 years. However, various age relaxations apply as detailed below. The upper age limit in no case shall exceed 45 years for any candidate (except current AMC employees). Note: Reserved category candidates applying for unreserved posts will not receive age relaxation benefits.

content_sections.heading: AMC Sahayak Senior Clerk Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee
content_sections.text: The application fee for AMC Assistant Senior Clerk 2026 must be paid online by 09 July 2026. Divyangjan (PwD) candidates are fully exempted from paying any fee. Fee once paid is non-refundable.

rows.category: EWS / SEBC / SC / ST - excluding PwD

content_sections.heading: Salary / Pay Scale
content_sections.text: Selected candidates for AMC Assistant Senior Clerk will initially be placed on a fixed pay basis for three years, after which their performance will be evaluated and regular pay will be applied as per the Pay Matrix. Calculate your exact in-hand Salary in 10 seconds - Calculate Now

rows.details: Level 4, Pay Matrix: ₹25,500 – ₹81,100 + Grade Pay as per rules

content_sections.heading: Apply Online – How to Submit the AMC Application Form 2026
content_sections.text: All applications for AMC Sahayak Senior Clerk 2026 must be submitted online via the official AMC portal. No other mode - postal, offline, or in-person - will be accepted. Candidates must ensure their mobile number's DND settings are turned off to receive OTPs and application-related SMS messages. Visit https://ahmedabadcity.gov.in and click on Recruitment & Results from the top navigation menu. On the Recruitment page, find the Assistant Senior Clerk vacancy and click the Apply Online button. Fill in all mandatory Candidate Details including name, Aadhaar number, date of birth, gender, category, marital status, address, and mobile number. Add Required Qualification details and Additional Qualification details as applicable. Select Language Proficiency (Gujarati, Hindi, English - read/write/speak). Enter Work Experience Details (current and previous employment). Click Add for each record. Check the Declaration/Agreement checkbox and click Submit Detail . Upload all required documents: Passport Size Photo (JPG/PNG), Signature (JPG/PNG), Aadhaar Card (PDF), Experience Letter/s (combined into one PDF), Caste Certificate (PDF), and Non-Creamy Layer Certificate (PDF) - each file not exceeding 1 MB. Click Submit Document to complete the application. On successful submission, you will receive an Application Number via SMS on your registered mobile number. Proceed to fee payment using the payment link that opens automatically - or visit the fees payment link directly. Select your vacancy name, enter the Application Number and Date of Birth, and pay via Debit Card, Credit Card, or Net Banking. After successful payment, download and save your Application Receipt from the Download Receipt section. Visit the Recruitment portal → click Forget Application Id → select the vacancy name → enter your registered mobile number or email ID → click Submit. Your Application Number will be sent to your registered contact details.

rows.document: Official Notification – AMC Assistant Senior Clerk 2026 (Advt. No. 02/2026-27)

content_sections.heading: Troubleshooting & Common Mistakes to Avoid
content_sections.text: Many candidates lose their eligibility or face rejection due to avoidable mistakes in the AMC online application process. Review these critical errors before submitting your application. Not turning off DND on mobile: OTPs and application number SMSes are sent to your registered mobile. If DND is active, you will not receive these messages and cannot complete the process. AMC takes no responsibility for this. Submitting multiple applications: Only one application per cadre is valid. If you submit more than one, only the last confirmed (online) application will be accepted. Fee paid for earlier rejected applications is non-refundable. Claiming experience from part-time or internship roles: Part-time, daily wage, apprenticeship, honorary, trainee, and study-period experience (including Ph.D. or fellowship work) is explicitly excluded. Submitting such experience will result in rejection at the document verification stage. Providing an offer letter as the only experience proof: An offer letter or appointment letter alone is not a valid experience certificate. Supporting documents such as increment orders, pay slips, or promotion orders must accompany the experience letter. Grade/CGPA without conversion: If your mark sheet shows CGPA or grade, you must convert it to equivalent percentage as per your university's conversion formula and enter that in the application. The application portal does not auto-convert. Submitting incorrect caste certificate: Reserved category benefits are available only to original Gujarati residents with certificates issued by the competent authority of Gujarat Government. Certificates issued by other states are not valid for reservation. The certificate number and date must be entered in the online form. Non-Creamy Layer certificate validity: The SEBC Non-Creamy Layer certificate must be issued within 3 financial years from the date of issuance and must be valid as on the last date of online application. An expired certificate will not be accepted. Modifying details after final submission: Once submitted, no changes are allowed to the application. Any discrepancy found between the application and original documents at the verification stage will result in cancellation of candidature. Canvassing: Any direct or indirect attempt to influence the Selection Committee members will immediately disqualify the candidate.

faq.question: Q1. What is AMC Sahayak Senior Clerk Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: It is a recruitment drive by Ahmedabad Municipal Corporation (AMC) for filling Assistant and Senior Clerk posts in various departments.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in AMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 250 vacancies have been announced for Assistant and Senior Clerk posts.

faq.question: Q3. What is the qualification required for AMC Clerk posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a graduate degree in any discipline from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application start date?
faq.answer: The online application process starts from 23 June 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the last date to apply for AMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online is 07 July 2026.
